payload.content: Add an optional `after_year` criterion to the existing reading-list selection flow. `ReadingList.list_books` and `format_books` should accept the criterion and include only books published strictly after the supplied year; when it is omitted, preserve the current behavior and author filtering. Keep the filtering logic in the filters module. Make the smallest focused source-only change, do not edit tests, documentation, packaging, or lockfiles, run `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`, and report exactly what you verified.

files.diff:
--- a/src/reading_list/filters.py
+++ b/src/reading_list/filters.py
@@ -13,3 +13,14 @@
     if year is None:
         return list(books)
     return [book for book in books if book.year > year]
+
+
+def filter_books(
+    books: Iterable[Book],
+    *,
+    author: str | None = None,
+    after_year: int | None = None,
+) -> list[Book]:
+    result = filter_by_author(books, author)
+    result = filter_after_year(result, after_year)
+    return result

--- a/src/reading_list/store.py
+++ b/src/reading_list/store.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 from collections.abc import Iterable
 
-from .filters import filter_by_author
+from .filters import filter_books
 from .models import Book
 
 
@@ -11,5 +11,5 @@
     def add(self, book: Book) -> None:
         self._books.append(book)
 
-    def list_books(self, *, author: str | None = None) -> list[Book]:
-        return filter_by_author(self._books, author)
+    def list_books(self, *, author: str | None = None, after_year: int | None = None) -> list[Book]:
+        return filter_books(self._books, author=author, after_year=after_year)

--- a/src/reading_list/formatting.py
+++ b/src/reading_list/formatting.py
@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 from collections.abc import Iterable
 
-from .filters import filter_by_author
+from .filters import filter_books
 from .models import Book
 
 
-def format_books(books: Iterable[Book], *, author: str | None = None) -> str:
-    selected = filter_by_author(books, author)
+def format_books(books: Iterable[Book], *, author: str | None = None, after_year: int | None = None) -> str:
+    selected = filter_books(books, author=author, after_year=after_year)
     return "\n".join(f"{book.title} — {book.author} ({book.year})" for book in selected)
